spec_match.rationale: The page demonstrates the reach-measurement pattern: a worklet reads interestGroups(), checks campaign prefixes, stores a seen key, and contributes one private aggregation bucket.

interactive.rationale: The mock audience walk is always interactive, with campaign focus, dedup on/off, live summaries, a populated per-user table, and an optional real sharedStorage.run path.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept now visibly walks the mock user population promised by the feature card and explains the worklet path as a capability-dependent enhancement.

edge_cases.rationale: The table shows users with no matching IGs, users matching one campaign, users matching multiple campaigns, already-counted deduping, and the overcount baseline when dedup is off.

references.rationale: The see-also section links to chromestatus.com/feature/5074536530444288, the Protected Audience reach explainer, and the Shared Storage interestGroups() pull request.

design_system.rationale: Interest-group pills now use high-contrast text on neutral backgrounds with accent borders, buttons set both background and color, and no raw color literals are used.

summary: The concept now renders the missing user-by-user deduplication walk, includes dedup on/off metrics, preserves an optional real worklet attempt, fixes pill contrast, and adds the required references.
